---
title: "Hi there."
image: profile.png

about:
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://linkedin.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/tiffanynle
    - icon: envelope-fill
      text: Email

sidebar: false

format:
  html:
    pagetitle: "Tiffany Le | Home"
---

My name is Tiffany Le. I am a computer science and mathematics student at [OU](https://www.ou.edu/).
